title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: This path is difficult to make out, as a sculpture garden of lush Nyessemian trees dominates the area.  The trees in this garden come together to form a tree-shaped stone fountain, with water pouring forth from individual stone faces carved on each tree.  This water collects in a wide stone pool beneath the installation, which glows with such luminescence that its depth cannot be casually determined.  On the room's other side, a perpendicular and narrow slope leads up.
